overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a medieval village during a dramatic red sunset. The character walks along stone walls and past timber-framed buildings while the camera follows from behind, capturing the warm atmospheric lighting of dusk.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts with stone wall and sunset view

agents.ego_description: standing still looking at the dramatic red sunset over distant mountains, then begins walking slowly along the stone wall

entered.detail: low stone wall running along the right side of the path
wooden wagon with large wheels parked near the wall
medieval half-timbered building with dark wooden beams and plaster walls
dramatic red and orange sunset sky with scattered clouds
mountain range silhouetted against the setting sun

segments.scene_description: Geralt stands by a stone wall overlooking a valley with a vibrant red sunset. The camera captures the silhouette of the character against the dramatic sky, with a wooden cart and distant timber-framed buildings visible in the warm evening light.

scene_state.functional_zone: village path alongside timber buildings and storage area

events.description: turns left and walks toward the timber-framed buildings, moving away from the open wall
moves from open hillside into the village building cluster with carts and barrels

agents.ego_description: walking along the stone wall and turning left toward the village buildings, passing wooden carts and stacked barrels

entered.detail: wooden barrels stacked on a pallet near the path
building with straw thatched roof adjacent to the timber house

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns left and walks along the village path, moving closer to the timber-framed buildings. The stone wall recedes into the distance as stacked barrels and a thatched roof building come into view, with the sunset sky partially obscured by the structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: open hillside with stone wall and panoramic sunset view

events.description: turns around and walks back toward the stone wall, facing the sunset again

agents.ego_description: turning around and walking back along the stone wall, facing the dramatic red sunset over the mountains

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees silhouetted against the red sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns back toward the open hillside, returning to the stone wall with the sunset sky fully visible again. Pine and birch trees line the path as the character walks along the wall, with the wooden cart now distant and the mountains silhouetted against the red sky.

events.description: villagers in red clothing become visible walking ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the village dirt path toward other villagers, passing wooden structures and carts

notable_agents.action: villagers in red tunics walking along the path ahead of Geralt

entered.detail: peasants in red clothing walking along the village path
worn dirt trail through the village center

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks into the village center along a dirt path, where villagers in red clothing become visible ahead. The timber-framed buildings line the path as the light fades to dusk, and the character continues walking past wooden carts toward the other villagers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a dramatic vista of a red sunset and gradually transitions into the heart of a medieval village at dusk. It begins with Geralt silhouetted against a vibrant sky by a stone wall overlooking a valley, before he turns left to walk along a village path where timber-framed buildings and stacked barrels begin to obscure the horizon. The camera then pivots back toward the open hillside, following the character past pine and birch trees as the mountains reappear against the crimson sky. Finally, the scene shifts inward as Geralt leaves the wall behind to enter the village center, moving along a dirt path past wooden carts toward villagers dressed in red as the warm evening light fades into the deep tones of dusk.
